default: Welcome to the Royal Society
Summer Exhibition 2025
I'm a PhotoSYNTH...
A SMILE POWERED SYNTHESIZER =D
Smile or open your mouth to begin!
Pose like your favourite emoji for new sounds
Tilt your head to change notes and octaves
Scan the QR code on the right to continue playing on your own device

instructions: What face do you make when someone gives you a big cuddle?
What face do you make when your friend makes you laugh and you can't stop smiling?
What face do you make when you find your favourite snack just when you were hungry?
What face do you make when you hear a very funny noise nearby?
What face do you make when you get a sticker and want everyone to see it?
What face do you make when someone says surprise out of nowhere?
What face do you make when you get to jump in a puddle with a big splash?
What face do you make when you build a very tall tower and it stays up?
What face do you make when you smell something delicious cooking?
What face do you make when you drop your ice cream?
What face do you make when the rain starts just when you want to play outside?
What face do you make when you lose your teddy?
What face do you make when someone says it's time to tidy up?
What face do you make when your tower crashes down?
What face do you make when you taste something yucky?
What face do you make when your socks feel wet and cold?
What face do you make when you can't find your shoe anywhere?
What face do you make when you are waiting and waiting for your turn?
What face do you make when someone takes your toy without asking?
What face do you make when you are trying not to laugh but the giggles escape?
What face do you make when someone shares with you?
What face do you make when someone won't share?
What face do you make when you hear your favourite song begin?
What face do you make when you are pretending to be a grumpy bear?
What face do you make when you are surprised and your eyes go wide?
What face do you make when you feel really sleepy?
What face do you make when you are sleepy but still curious about what's next?
What face do you make when you see a dog bigger than you expected?
What face do you make when a monkey steals your banana?
What face do you make when you see the biggest cake in the world?
What face do you make when a feather tickles your nose?
What face do you make when you are a king or queen on a throne?
What face do you make when you are a dragon trying not to sneeze?
What face do you make when you are a lion with a sore paw?

default: Welcome to the Royal Society
Summer Exhibition 2025
I'm a PhotoSYNTH...
A SMILE POWERED SYNTHESIZER =D
Accessible musical instrument
(and super pop video machine!)
Part of the Accessible Musical Instrument Collection
Curated by Drake Music
Smile or open your mouth to begin!
Change instruments and video effects by posing...
like your favourite emoji =P
Each expression will change the sound
Be fond and show your affection
For beautiful VFX
and remixed visuals
Tilt, twist and bend your neck
to change between notes and octaves
Your job is to make some beautiful music!
Things are definitely more fun with friends
And far more musical and interesting too!
Scan the QR code on the right to continue playing on your own device
And carry on the fun at home!
Or you can go to interface.place
Or photosynth.app to learn more.
